com.launchdarkly.sdk

Class LDContextEncoder

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.launchdarkly.sdk.LDContextEncoder

  • public final class LDContextEncoder
extends java.lang.Object
    Encodes an LDContext into a plain nested Map<String, Object> structure without round-tripping through JSON serialization. Leaf attribute values are converted by LDValueConverter.

    Output shape:

    • A null or invalid context produces an empty map.
    • A single-kind context produces a map containing kind, key, name (only when non-null), anonymous (always present), and one entry for each custom attribute.
    • A multi-kind context produces {"kind":"multi", "key":<fullyQualifiedKey>, <kindName>:{...}, ...} where each per-kind nested map omits kind (it is implied by the property key).

    • Method Summary

      static java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.Object> encode(LDContext context)
      Encodes an LDContext into a plain nested Map<String, Object>.

    • Method Detail

      • encode

        public static java.util.Map<java.lang.String,java.lang.Object> encode(LDContext context)
        Encodes an LDContext into a plain nested Map<String, Object>.
        Parameters:
        context - the context to encode; may be null
        Returns:
        the encoded map; never null (an empty map is returned for invalid or null input)
